name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: NATO chief Rutte now says he is “absolutely convinced” the alliance will be able to secure the Strait of Hormuz.

name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: Wikipedia bans prolific editor after investigation reveals he was responsible for over a million pro-hamas edits on the site.

name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: Iran begins collecting $2 million in transit fees per vessel for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz.
